docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WHITE, JAMES DBA SHOE REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JAMES WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT DAOUD ELGHOUSAEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, JAMES DBA SHOE REPAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JAMES WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT DAOUD ELGHOUSAEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 20.00 - SERVED JUN-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ELGHOUSAEN, DAOUD DBA FRANK SHOE REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
